_notes: Renesas RA4M1 main MCU + ESP32-S3-MINI-1 coprocessor for WiFi/BLE. RA4M1 itself has no native USB Host but the board uses the RA4M1 USB peripheral for host-PC USB CDC (D-/D+). BLE provided through the ESP32-S3 coprocessor. Default Wire on A4/A5 (Arduino indices 18/19); Wire1 on Qwiic header (internal pins outside the public 0..19 range). 12x8 LED matrix uses internal pins. RA4M1: 32KB SRAM, 256KB Flash.
name: Arduino UNO R4 WiFi
special: ESP32-S3 coprocessor for WiFi 2.4GHz + BLE 5.0 (use WiFiS3 / ArduinoBLE libraries)
12x8 red LED matrix on the silkscreen
Qwiic / STEMMA QT I2C connector wired to Wire1
CAN bus pins on D4 (RX) / D5 (TX) via internal CAN peripheral
